name: feature-loader-c6-spike-1
description: Phase 1 spike (ADR 0015 / docs/research/2026-05-07-c6-dawn-pipeline-cache-spike.md) — sample 1 of 5. Clears C6 history then loads Penumbra fresh; the atlas-pipeline build records the FIRST sample. Fails if the C6 stub didn't capture a sample (proves the renderer's onPipelineCreate hook is wired). Run as part of the `feature-loader-c6-spike` suite to accumulate cold-vs-warm comparison.

commands: (() => { const r = window.__canaryGetC6CacheReport(); if (!r || r.ok === false) throw new Error('C6 stub unavailable: ' + JSON.stringify(r)); const atlas = r.labels && r.labels['penumbra-render-atlas']; if (!atlas) throw new Error('atlas pipeline label missing from report — onPipelineCreate hook not wired? labels=' + JSON.stringify(Object.keys(r.labels || {}))); if (atlas.samples < 1) throw new Error('atlas samples=' + atlas.samples + ' (expected >=1) — wiring works but no build observed'); console.log('[c6-spike-1] sample 1 captured: cold=' + atlas.coldMs + 'ms samples=' + atlas.samples); return 'sample 1 ok'; })()
